titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of One Who Has No Heir
Chapter on the Inheritance of One Who Has No Heir

segments: : "مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ مِنْ قَرَابَةٍ وَ لاَ مَوْلَى عَتَاقَةٍ قَدْ ضَمِنَ جَرِيرَتَهُ فَمَالُهُ مِنَ اَلْأَنْفَالِ".
arabic.text: : "مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ مِنْ قَرَابَةٍ وَ لاَ مَوْلَى عَتَاقَةٍ قَدْ ضَمِنَ جَرِيرَتَهُ فَمَالُهُ مِنَ اَلْأَنْفَالِ".

segments:
Hadith.5714 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"Whoever dies and has no heir from relatives nor a freed slave who has guaranteed his liability (jarirah), then his wealth belongs to the anfal (public treasury or property of the Islamic state)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5714 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"Whoever dies and has no heir from relatives nor a freed slave who has guaranteed his liability (jarirah), then his wealth belongs to the anfal (public treasury or property of the Islamic state)."

narratorChain.raw: 5714 - رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of One Who Has No Heir

segments: 5715 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : "أَنَّ مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ فَمَالُهُ لِهَمْشَهْرِيجِهِ " يَعْنِي أَهْلَ بَلَدِهِ.
arabic.text: 5715 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : "أَنَّ مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ فَمَالُهُ لِهَمْشَهْرِيجِهِ " يَعْنِي أَهْلَ بَلَدِهِ.

segments: Hadith.5715 - It has also been narrated in another report: "Whoever dies and has no heir, his wealth belongs to his Hamshahrij," meaning the people of his town.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.5715 - It has also been narrated in another report: "Whoever dies and has no heir, his wealth belongs to his Hamshahrij," meaning the people of his town.

titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of One Who Has No Heir

segments: رَجُلٍ مُسْلِمٍ قُتِلَ وَ لَهُ أَبٌ نَصْرَانِيٌّ لِمَنْ تَكُونُ دِيَتُهُ قَالَ "تُؤْخَذُ فَتُجْعَلُ فِي بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ لِأَنَّ جِنَايَتَهُ عَلَى بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ ".
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ مُسْلِمٍ قُتِلَ وَ لَهُ أَبٌ نَصْرَانِيٌّ لِمَنْ تَكُونُ دِيَتُهُ قَالَ "تُؤْخَذُ فَتُجْعَلُ فِي بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ لِأَنَّ جِنَايَتَهُ عَلَى بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ ".

segments:
Hadith.5716 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah from Sulayman ibn Khalid from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a Muslim man who was killed and had a Christian father.
Imam (as) was asked: "To whom does his blood money (diyyah) go?"
Imam (as) said: "It is taken and placed in the treasury (Bayt Al-Mal) of the Muslims because his liability falls upon the treasury of the Muslims."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5716 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah from Sulayman ibn Khalid from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a Muslim man who was killed and had a Christian father.
Imam (as) was asked: "To whom does his blood money (diyyah) go?"
Imam (as) said: "It is taken and placed in the treasury (Bayt Al-Mal) of the Muslims because his liability falls upon the treasury of the Muslims."

narratorChain.raw: 5716 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي
